questions.label: Technical delivery confidence
questions.hint: How confident are you in the team's ability to deliver the technical component?

questions.label: Business delivery confidence
questions.hint: How confident are you in the team's ability to deliver business outcomes? (Weighted heaviest)

questions.label: Practical privacy / compliance fit
questions.hint: Does the project genuinely benefit from Miden's privacy or compliance features?

questions.label: Guardian leverage
questions.hint: Does this project leverage or benefit from Guardian? Select all that apply.

questions.label: Wallet / narrative fit
questions.hint: Does this project align with the wallet narrative and Miden's ecosystem story?

questions.label: Product already built?
questions.hint: What is the current build status of the product?

questions.label: Similar Pioneer / partner exists?
questions.hint: Is anyone else building a similar solution in the ecosystem?

specialRule.warning: ⚠️ Special rule applied: Guardian = 0 and compliance fit = 0 — outcome capped at "Needs further discussion"

outcomes.label: No — not this stage
outcomes.description: This project does not meet the threshold for Pioneer support at this stage.

outcomes.label: Needs further discussion
outcomes.description: There is potential here, but more information or alignment is needed before a decision.

outcomes.label: Yes — Pioneer (technical support only, no grant)
outcomes.description: Qualifies for Pioneer with technical support. No grant at this stage.

outcomes.label: Yes — Pioneer ($10k POC → $100k+ milestone-based grant)
outcomes.description: Qualifies for Pioneer with a $10k POC grant, with potential for $100k+ milestone-based funding.

outcomes.label: Yes — Strategic partner discussion
outcomes.description: Qualifies for strategic partner discussion (like NEAR Intents, OZ, Self).
